title: feat: default grok-imagine to 2K resolution
author: TRDEFI
pr_body_excerpt:
Fixes #12584

Basic `grok-imagine` now returns 2K images by default for both text-to-image generation and image editing.

Changes:
- Added `resolution: "2k"` to request body when model is `grok-imagine-image`
- `grok-imagine-pro` remains on its current resolution and billing tier

References #9706

gist.headline: Grok gets more pixels
gist.blurb: Basic grok-imagine now opens its eyes in 2K. The pro bee keeps its existing resolution and billing perch, while the standard path gets a sharper garden.
gist.summary: Basic `grok-imagine-image` requests now send `resolution: "2k"` by default for both text-to-image generation and image editing, while `grok-imagine-pro` keeps its existing resolution and billing tier.
gist.impact: Users of basic grok-imagine will receive sharper 2K outputs by default for new images and edits without changing their requests.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli as a tiny pixel-art photographer or art restorer using oversized cozy 2K spectacles to inspect a crisp generated landscape on a retro CRT monitor. A standard grok-imagine image blooms into a more detailed garden scene, with pixel flowers and code-plants gaining visible detail; a small separate pro-mode sign quietly remains unchanged.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny photographer beret, adjusting a retro CRT monitor that displays a beautifully crisp 2K pixel garden being generated and gently edited. Lime green (#ecf874) glows prominently around code-plants and blooming flowers, with soft mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream gradients; subtle pixel-font text reads "2K". Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny photographer beret, adjusting a retro CRT monitor that displays a beautifully crisp 2K pixel garden being generated and gently edited. Lime green (#ecf874) glows prominently around code-plants and blooming flowers, with soft mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream gradients; subtle pixel-font text reads "2K". Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, nostalgic but beautiful.
